# example.com

Purpose: generic crawl hints for a site built from Editorial Starter.

- Site: https://example.com/
- Homepage: https://example.com/
- Posts index: https://example.com/blog/
- Newsletter section: https://example.com/#newsletter-signup
- Featured story placeholder: https://example.com/featured-story/

More detail: https://example.com/llms-full.txt
